title: Animal Garden - Mouse
description: Adds tamable mice into the game, that will fight and protect you.
body:
Adds cute tamable mice into the game, that will fight and protect you when in need.

And they are cute.
 

By default they spawn in forest, desert and badlands biomes.
(You can change this and other spawn settings by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders or via resource pack)

There is 10% chance that an alpha mouse will spawn. (Bigger and stronger, but still cute though...)

They have 8 color variants.

 

Sometimes they will beg you to give them some food.

You can tame or breed them with any food item

and if you give them rotten flesh then their attack will poison their target for 15 sec.
(This buff lasts for 15 min)

Mod Currently Supports:

**Forge 26.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Fabric 26.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Neoforge 26.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1**
